Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, low total CO₂, and significant proteinuria, suggesting possible renal impairment with metabolic acidosis. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, proteinuria, ketonuria, glucosuria) further support renal dysfunction, possibly nephrotic syndrome or acute kidney injury. HbA1c is unexpectedly low despite glucosuria; consider lab artifact or hemoglobinopathy. Recommend nephrology evaluation and further assessment for underlying causes.
